info.title: UrbnBox integration API
info.description: Create locker bookings and shipments, discover stores, and connect Shopify.

tags.name: Shipments
tags.description: Quote, create, and retrieve partner shipments.

tags.name: Checkout sessions
tags.description: Hold lockers for partner checkout sessions.

tags.name: Vendor API
tags.description: Vendor-authenticated endpoints. All require X-API-Key header with a vendor-scoped key.

post.description: Checks locker availability and returns a fee quote. The origin locker is selected by the server.
Creates a locker-to-locker shipment. This endpoint requires a secret partner key. The deposit PIN is returned only in this response.

422.description: No lockers are available for the requested route and dates.

get.description: Returns a shipment owned by the authenticated partner.
Returns active locker spaces available for partner checkout.

post.description: Creates a partner checkout session and holds a locker. Supply an Idempotency-Key when retrying a request.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Stable key used to prevent duplicate sessions.

get.description: Returns a checkout session owned by the authenticated partner.
Returns active stores and their locker and shelf capacity.
Returns stores within a radius of a geographic coordinate.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Search radius in metres. Defaults to 5000.

get.description: Returns locker spaces for the browser checkout widget.

post.description: Creates the locker booking used by the checkout widget.
Shopify calls this endpoint to request an UrbnBox shipping rate. UrbnBox validates the Shopify HMAC signature.

200.description: A Shopify rates envelope. The rates array is empty when service is unavailable.

post.description: Creates a shipment for a recognized Shopify store when lockers are available.

200.description: Acknowledgement. Successful creation includes a shipment ID and tracking URL.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders for the authenticated vendor.

post.description: Creates a new order. Idempotent on external_reference — returns the existing order if already created.

200.description: Existing order returned (idempotent match on external_reference)

get.description:
Returns `urbnbox-orders-template.csv` — a pre-formatted CSV with correct headers and two example rows. No authentication required. Fill it in, then POST to `/api/vendor/v1/orders/import-csv`.

**Column order (do not change):**

| # | Column | Required | Notes |
|---|--------|----------|-------|
| 1 | `external_reference` | Yes | Your order ID — used for idempotency |
| 2 | `client_name` | Yes | Recipient full name |
| 3 | `client_phone` | Yes | Kenyan number (`07xx` or `+254xx`) |
| 4 | `description` | Yes | Item description |
| 5 | `quantity` | Yes | Positive integer |
| 6 | `unit_price_kes` | Yes | Price in KES, e.g. `1500` |
| 7 | `pickup_type` | Yes | `delivery` or `locker` |

**Example file contents:**

```csv
external_reference,client_name,client_phone,description,quantity,unit_price_kes,pickup_type
ORD-001,Jane Doe,0712345678,Blue hoodie size M,2,1500,delivery
ORD-002,John Smith,0798765432,Running shoes size 42,1,4500,locker
```

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import requests

resp = requests.get('https://api.urbnbox.com/api/vendor/v1/orders/csv-template')
with open('urbnbox-orders-template.csv', 'wb') as f:
    f.write(resp.content)
print('Template saved.')

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js

200.description: CSV template file — save and open in Excel or Google Sheets

text/csv.example:
external_reference,client_name,client_phone,description,quantity,unit_price_kes,pickup_type
ORD-001,Jane Doe,0712345678,Blue hoodie size M,2,1500,delivery
ORD-002,John Smith,0798765432,Running shoes size 42,1,4500,locker

post.description:
Upload a CSV file to validate and preview order creation. Returns a row-by-row result — valid rows and any errors. Use `/api/vendor/v1/orders/csv-template` to download the correct format first.

**Note:** This endpoint validates and returns results; it does not create orders automatically. Use the JSON `/api/vendor/v1/orders/bulk` endpoint to actually create orders, or use the vendor dashboard UI for a guided import flow.

file.description: CSV file. First row must be the header row.

valid_count.description: Number of rows that passed validation

error.description: Only present if this row failed validation

get.description:
Returns `urbnbox-shipments-template.csv` — a pre-formatted CSV with correct headers and two example rows. No authentication required. Fill it in, then POST to `/api/vendor/v1/shipments/import-csv`.

**Column order (do not change):**

| # | Column | Required | Notes |
|---|--------|----------|-------|
| 1 | `external_reference` | Yes | Your shipment ID — used for idempotency |
| 2 | `recipient_name` | Yes | Full name of recipient |
| 3 | `recipient_phone` | Yes | Kenyan number (`07xx` or `+254xx`) |
| 4 | `origin_city` | Yes | e.g. `Nairobi` |
| 5 | `destination_city` | Yes | e.g. `Mombasa` |
| 6 | `weight_tier` | Yes | `small`, `medium`, or `large` |

**Weight tiers:** `small` = up to 5 kg · `medium` = 5–15 kg · `large` = 15–30 kg

**Example file contents:**

```csv
external_reference,recipient_name,recipient_phone,origin_city,destination_city,weight_tier
SHIP-001,Alice Mwangi,0712345678,Nairobi,Mombasa,small
SHIP-002,Bob Otieno,0798765432,Kisumu,Nairobi,medium
```

x-codeSamples.label: Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import requests

resp = requests.get('https://api.urbnbox.com/api/vendor/v1/shipments/csv-template')
with open('urbnbox-shipments-template.csv', 'wb') as f:
    f.write(resp.content)
print('Template saved.')

200.description: CSV template file — save and open in Excel or Google Sheets

post.description: Upload a CSV file to validate shipment rows. Returns per-row results. Use `/api/vendor/v1/shipments/csv-template` to download the correct format first.

get.description: Returns the authenticated vendor's ledger balance and recent payout history.

post.description: Returns a price quote for a shipment without creating it.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Vendor API key. Keys with prefix ubx_test_ or ubx_live_ identify vendor accounts.

partnerKey.name: X-API-Key
partnerKey.description: Partner key. Shipment creation requires a secret key.

publishableKey.name: X-API-Key
publishableKey.description: Publishable key restricted to allowed browser origins.

shopifyHmac.name: X-Shopify-Hmac-Sha256
shopifyHmac.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 signature generated by Shopify.

deposit_pin.description: One-time deposit PIN. Store it when creating the shipment.

LockerSpace.description: The current Go API serializes this model with exported field names.

BadRequest.description: The request body, date, field, or query parameter is invalid.

Unauthorized.description: The credential is missing, invalid, or inactive.

Forbidden.description: The credential is not authorized for this operation.

NotFound.description: The resource does not exist for the authenticated partner.

ServerError.description: UrbnBox could not complete the request.
